units.title: TFIM toy-model to code-method bridge
units.summary: The bounded TFIM benchmark bridges toy-model understanding and code-method route memory.

units.title: Benchmark before portability claim
units.summary: Promote the bounded exact benchmark memory before promoting broader code portability.

units.title: Benchmark-first validation
units.summary: Broader code-memory claims should wait until the tiny exact benchmark closes.

units.title: TFIM benchmark substrate
units.summary: Small finite-size TFIM substrate used for the first bounded exact benchmark.

units.title: TFIM exact-diagonalization helper
units.summary: Dense exact diagonalization helper used for the public tiny TFIM benchmark.

units.title: TFIM weak-coupling benchmark intuition
units.summary: Weak-coupling physical picture for why the TFIM exact diagonalization benchmark workflow is a useful first bounded route.

units.title: Jones codRestrict + subtype composition construction recipe
units.summary: Reusable Lean proof fragment for building a range-facing map by first codRestricting into a proved range target and then composing with the ambient subtype map.

units.title: Jones Chapter 4 Finite-Product Block-Centralizer Type-I Packet
units.summary: Bounded theorem-card candidate for the current Jones Chapter 4 finite-dimensional/type-I backbone: package the compile-checked block-centralizer finite-product theorem packet as the current honest finite-dimensional anchor, exposing the ambient centralizer as a linear product of block-fiber full-operator/type-I pieces together with the centralizer subalgebra identification, diagonal block-compression formula, and finrank audit, without claiming the stronger subalgebra-level AlgEquiv product theorem or the full Chapter 4 classification route.

units.title: Fresh Jones Finite Dimensional Factor Closure Topic Skill Projection
units.summary: Validated reusable execution projection for the topic's theorem-facing formal-theory route.
